debug_info.goal:
μ : ℝ
v p : NNReal
t : ℝ
S : Set ℝ := Icc (μ - 2 * √↑v) (μ + 2 * √↑v)
⊢ ∀ x ∈ S, |Real.exp (t * x)| ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √↑v))

failed_attempts:
intro x hx
        simp [abs_exp]
        have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (μ - 2 * √↑v) (μ + 2 * √↑v) := hx
        have h2 : μ - 2 * √↑v ≤ x ∧ x ≤ μ + 2 * √↑v := Set.mem_Icc.mp h1
        have h3 : |x| ≤ |μ| + 2 * √↑v := by
          calc
            |x| = |μ + (x - μ)| := by ring
            _ ≤ |μ| + |x - μ| := abs_add μ (x - μ)
            _ ≤ |μ| + 2 * √↑v := by
              have h4 : |x - μ| ≤ 2 * √↑v := by
                apply abs_sub_le_iff.mpr
                constructor
                · linarith [h2.1]
                · linarith [h2.2]
              linarith
        calc
          t * x ≤ |t| * |x| := by apply mul_le_mul_abs
          _ ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √↑v) := by gcongr
        exact Real.exp_le_exp.mpr this
gcongr

intro x hx
      rw [abs_exp]
      have h1 : x ∈ Icc (μ - 2 * √v) (μ + 2 * √v) := hx
      have h2 : μ - 2 * √v ≤ x ∧ x ≤ μ + 2 * √v := Icc.mem.mp h1
      have h3 : |x| ≤ |μ| + 2 * √v := by
        calc
          |x| = |μ + (x - μ)| := by ring
          _ ≤ |μ| + |x - μ| := abs_add _ _
          _ ≤ |μ| + 2 * √v := by
            have h4 : |x - μ| ≤ 2 * √v := by
              rw [abs_le]
              constructor
              · linarith [h2.1]
              · linarith [h2.2]
            linarith
      calc
        Real.exp (t * x) ≤ Real.exp (|t * x|) := Real.exp_le_exp.mpr (le_abs_self _)
        _ = Real.exp (|t| * |x|) := by rw [abs_mul]
        _ ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v)) := Real.exp_le_exp.mpr (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left h3 (abs_nonneg t))

intro x hx
        simp [abs_exp]
        have h1 : x ∈ Icc (μ - 2 * √↑v) (μ + 2 * √↑v) := hx
        have h2 : μ - 2 * √↑v ≤ x ∧ x ≤ μ + 2 * √↑v := Icc.mem_iff.mp h1
        have h3 : |x| ≤ |μ| + 2 * √↑v := by
          calc
            |x| = |μ + (x - μ)| := by rw [add_sub_cancel']
            _ ≤ |μ| + |x - μ| := abs_add _ _
            _ ≤ |μ| + 2 * √↑v := by
              have h4 : |x - μ| ≤ 2 * √↑v := by
                apply abs_sub_le_iff.mpr
                constructor
                · linarith [h2.1]
                · linarith [h2.2]
              linarith
        calc
          t * x ≤ |t| * |x| := by apply mul_le_mul_abs
          _ ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √↑v) := by gcongr
        exact Real.exp_le_exp.mpr this

intro x hx
      simp only [abs_exp, Real.exp_le_exp]
      have h1 : |t * x| = |t| * |x| := by simp [abs_mul]
      rw [h1]
      have h2 : |x| ≤ |μ| + 2 * √↑v := by
        rcases hx with ⟨h_left, h_right⟩
        calc
          |x| = |(x - μ) + μ| := by ring
          _ ≤ |x - μ| + |μ| := abs_add _ _
          _ ≤ 2 * √↑v + |μ| := by
            have h3 : |x - μ| ≤ 2 * √↑v := by
              apply abs_le_of_mem_Icc
              constructor
              · linarith
              · linarith
            linarith
          _ = |μ| + 2 * √↑v := by ring
      exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left h2 (abs_nonneg t)

      have h2 : μ - 2 * √↑v ≤ x ∧ x ≤ μ + 2 * √↑v := Set.mem_Icc.mp h1
      have h3 : |x| ≤ |μ| + 2 * √↑v := by
        calc
          |x| = |μ + (x - μ)| := by ring
          _ ≤ |μ| + |x - μ| := abs_add _ _
          _ ≤ |μ| + 2 * √↑v := by
            have h4 : |x - μ| ≤ 2 * √↑v := by
              apply abs_sub_le_iff.mpr
              constructor <;> linarith [h2.1, h2.2]
            linarith
      calc
        Real.exp (t * x) ≤ Real.exp (|t * x|) := Real.exp_le_exp.mpr (le_abs_self _)
        _ = Real.exp (|t| * |x|) := by rw [abs_mul]
        _ ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √↑v)) := Real.exp_le_exp.mpr (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left h3 (abs_nonneg t))
